automation.purpose: Generate index plan for railway gradient layout using CSV data

columns.name: Rise/Fall
columns.description: Rise/Fall direction and gradient value. R = Rise, F = Fall

newChainage.description: New chainage value calculated as CH divided by horizontal scale

ogRailLevel.description: from CSV file correspoding to chainage, or user input $startingChainage

newRailLevel.description: New rail level value calculated as RL divided by vertical scale

functions.buffer height of polyline?: draw first polyline, consider the $insertionPoint as $startingChainage point, draw a exact 1meter (bottom to top),
functions.railLevel mtext label?: Add mtext label with a offset 0.2meter above 1meter polyline with value $ogRailLevel with a properties $mTextRailLevel.
functions.railLevel height of polyline?: draw second polyline with a offset 12meter above 1meter polyline, polyline height value = $newRailLevel (CSV file columns:CH value with user input $startingChainage and find the corresponding columns:RL value, then calculate new rail level as $newRailLevel = columns:RL / verticalScale)
functions.Rise/Fall mtext label?: Add mtext label with a offset 12meter above 1meter polyline with value columns:RF (CSV file columns:CH value with user input $startingChainage and find the corresponding columns:RF value) with a properties $mTextRiseFall. Alignment it from (vertial:offset 12meter above 1meter polyline),(horizontal: between two $newRailLevel polyline).
functions.what is the next chainage distance?: Check the next row in CSV file columns:CH value, then calculate newChainage as $newChainage = columns:CH / horizontalScale, find the corresponding columns:RL value, then calculate new rail level as $newRailLevel = columns:RL / verticalScale, rename text and keep value same as csv (R 1247) means (R 1 IN 1247), (F 284) means (F 1 IN 284).
functions.connect the polyline?: Connect all vertext from top of $newRailLevel.
functions.repeat the process until the end of CSV: Repeat the process of drawing 1meter polyline, adding mtext label, and calculating newChainage and newRailLevel until the end of CSV file is reached.
